experience.title: Assistant Head Concierge Westminster
experience.description: Opening the door to the political heartland of Britain. InterContinental London Westminster opens its doors in November 2012, injecting a new lease of life into an historic former government building, Queen Anne’s Chambers. In an area where politics, business and influencers come together, the hotel is situated within a few minutes' walk of Westminster Abbey, Big Ben, and the Houses of Parliament, well within the eight minute division bell. The hotel will feature 256 rooms, 7 meeting rooms and exceptional dining at Blue Boar Smokehouse and Bar. The InterContinental Westminster will be the second London hotel from the luxury brand of the InterContinental Hotels Group which also owns the budget Holiday Inn brand, boutique Indigo hotels, and the Crowne Plaza chain. The new hotel joins the existing InterContinental London Park Lane which opened in 1975 Our beautiful 5 star property opens in 2012 and I am delighted to be part of such an exciting new opening.

experience.title: Deputy Head Concierge
experience.description: Conrad London St James, 256 room five star hotel, 1 restaurant, 1 bar, 1 tea lounge, 7 meeting rooms, 1 In September was part of the team that rebranded to the Conrad London St James, working with the owning company and Conrad Brand team to ensure a successful rebrand in five weeks as well as the IHG team to ensure a smooth transition. Part of the Pre-Opening team for the InterContinental that opened in November 2012, had a successful opening ,establishing the hotel in the top 30 hotels in London on Trip Advisor and a guest survey satisfaction of 87.7% average over the two years.

experience.title: Luggage Porter Concierge

experience.title: Junior Concierge
experience.description: I started here when the Lanesborough first opened and we where expected it to get busy but it didnt so was advised to move on to further my career.

experience.title: Concierge
experience.description: This role included booking Theatres, Restaurants and advising our Guests of the best restaurants around London and England. I was holding a concierge position and enjoying it when the owner David Levin came in and ask me to return to the Capital Hotel.

experience.title: Deputy Head Concierge
experience.description: After working here for over 17years and doing everything from booking theatre tickets, private car hires and booking restaurants to organising private itineraries and looking after the switchboard and taking room service orders. I also had to cover the porters and doorman when they where busy and help them out.

experience.title: Treasurer
experience.organization: The Society of the Golden Keys of Great Britain & the Commonwealth

experience.title: Assistant Chief Concierge
experience.description: After working in small hotels it is a big challenge to work in a 300 bedroom hotel, and in charge of over 22 staff members who look up to me for guidance and direction. We have a busy desk from 07.00 to 11pm and we handle a huge diversity of requests. I am now involved with covering a Manager on Duty shift twice a month, and also i am one of the departmental trainers in which i ensure each person has 7hours training a month.

experience.title: Head Concierge
experience.description: After starting at the Flemings Mayfair Hotel in August 2014, I have the responsibility to help rebuild and recruit new members for the Concierge team and to help move the hotel forward in standards and service to take on the other exclusive boutique 5 star hotels in London. My daily tasks include the day to day running of the department, organising rotas, timesheets, appraisal's, interviews and sourcing new suppliers for the Hotel and helping to promote the Flemings.
